title: Fun at Botanical Garden this weekend
description: GEORGE NEWS - Georgians are invited to join...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Georgians are invited to join in the fun at the Garden Route Botanical Garden this weekend when they are presenting their annual autumn plant sale as well as Sunday Market.


> The Garden Route Indigenous Nursery is offering 15% off all plants for this weekend only. The sale starts today, Friday 30 May, from 08:00 - 17:00 and will continue through the weekend. Hours are Saturday from 08:00 to 14:00 and Sunday from 10:00 to 14:00.


Stock up and plant indigenous by choosing from a large variety of fynbos and medicinal plants. They also have a wide selection of indigenous trees.

Entry to the popular Sunday Market on Sunday is free and it promises to be a vibrant and fun-filled day, starting at 10:00 and concluding at 14:00.


> Skye Gypsy is providing live entertainment and there will be a jumping castle and face painting for the children. Dogs are welcome on a leash.


There will be a host of food stalls with delicious fare, from boerewors rolls, roosterkoek and pancakes to halaal meals, Indian food, soups, jaffles, bubble tea, and more.

Craft and gift stalls will offer a huge variety of local treasures including plants, handmade clothes, soaps, jewellery, art, candles, gnomes, skincare, and unique 3D-printed items.

The Sunday Market is a perfect outing for the whole family.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
